gist.headline: Watering the Apps
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, updating health checks and metrics for all the community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the APPS.md registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: A cute pixel art robot (Monitor Robot) and Polly the bee checking on a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a clipboard with a checklist, and Polly is watering small code-plants in lime green pots. Represents automated health checks and metrics updates.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, standing next to the bee mascot who is watering small code-plants in lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, standing next to the bee mascot who is watering small code-plants in lime green (#ecf874) flower pots.
